items.source: Install from Chrome Web Store, load latest zip manually, or build via `pnpm install` and `pnpm build`; supports OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Ollama, Groq, Cerebras and compatible providers.

items.source: Install path is explicit: install Claude Code, then `npm install -g @musistudio/claude-code-router`, configure `~/.claude-code-router/config.json`, and run via `ccr`/activated env vars.

items.source: The agent is the product surface, with 15+ providers, Claude/ChatGPT/Gemini subscription access, 70+ MCP extensions, custom distributions and local workflows.

items.source: The agent loop is designed around small-model weaknesses: context budgeting, parser repair, tool routing, decomposition, fallback escalation, and observability.
items.zhCN: The 智能体 loop is designed around small-model weaknesses：上下文 budgeting，parser repair，tool routing，decomposition，fallback escalation，和 observability。

items.source: The AI surface is not a chat widget bolted on later; it exposes one agent backend across app UI, mobile, team chat and generative UI components.
items.zhCN: The AI surface is not a chat widget bolted on later；it exposes one 智能体 backend across app UI，mobile，team chat 和 generative UI components。

items.source: The app’s product hook is malleability: the software can reshape its own UI through agent-generated changes while preserving a safety/rollback boundary.
items.zhCN: The app’s product hook is malleability：the software can reshape its own UI through 智能体-generated changes while preserving a safety/rollback boundary。

items.source: The browser becomes the agent runtime boundary: browsing, tool execution, privacy control, and user-visible automation are treated as product primitives.

items.source: The browser is treated as an agent environment driven by visual understanding, task goals, and action planning.
items.zhCN: The 浏览器 is treated as an 智能体 environment driven by visual understanding，task goals，和 action planning。

items.source: The CLI is built around iterative LLM planning, tool use, code edits, and command execution.
items.zhCN: The CLI is built around iterative LLM planning，tool use，代码编辑，和命令执行。

items.zhCN: The core artifact is not a model，但 craft encoded as 智能体-native procedures 具备 render/screenshot/verify loops 面向 visual production。

items.source: The core loop is LLM planning, tool use, terminal interaction, and code editing, with cache-aware economics as a product differentiator.
items.zhCN: The core loop is LLM planning，tool use，终端 interaction，和 code editing，具备 cache-aware economics as a product differentiator。

items.source: The core workflow is AI coding session orchestration, context management, and agent task handling.
items.zhCN: The core 工作流 is AI coding session orchestration，上下文 management，和智能体 task handling。

items.zhCN: The interface is organized around 智能体 changes，会话，resumes，skills，screenshots，和 usage。

items.zhCN: The map is refreshed 和 enforced inside the 智能体 loop through hooks，not just generated 面向 humans。

items.zhCN: The mobile app treats 智能体会话 as the primary object 和 extends coding 智能体 operations beyond the 终端。

items.source: The product loop is agentic coding: inspect repo, edit files, run commands, and produce reviewable patches.
items.zhCN: The product loop is 智能体编码：检查 repo，edit files，run commands，和 produce reviewable patches。

items.source: The product manages a fleet of agents rather than a single assistant, turning planning, execution, feedback repair, and PR lifecycle into an agent-native workflow.
items.zhCN: The product manages a fleet of 智能体而不是 a single assistant，turning planning，execution，feedback repair，和 PR lifecycle into an 智能体-native 工作流。

items.source: The product model is agent sessions, sub-agents, policy enforcement, cloud sandboxes, and live collaboration.
items.zhCN: The product model is 智能体会话，sub-智能体，policy enforcement，cloud sandboxes，和 live collaboration。

items.source: The product object is an agent group with task decomposition, coordination, and context flow.
items.zhCN: The product object is an 智能体 group 具备 task decomposition，coordination，和上下文 flow。

items.source: The product premise is not search UI, but agent-initiated merchant discovery and checkout across open commerce/payment protocols.
items.zhCN: The product premise is not search UI，但智能体-initiated merchant discovery 和 checkout across open commerce/payment protocols。

items.source: The product surface is an agent workforce layer: visual/conversational/code authoring, deployment, integrations, model orchestration and team management.
items.zhCN: The 产品界面/入口 is an 智能体 workforce layer：visual/conversational/code authoring，deployment，integrations，model orchestration 和 team management。

items.source: The product surface is organized around graph-enhanced retrieval and LLM usage.
items.zhCN: The 产品界面/入口 is organized around graph-enhanced retrieval 和 LLM usage。

items.source: The product value is the workspace itself: routing work to multiple agents, exposing agent state, and giving humans a common command surface for agent collaboration.
items.zhCN: The product value is the 工作空间 itself：routing work to multiple 智能体，exposing 智能体 state，和 giving humans a common command surface 面向智能体 collaboration。

items.source: The product wraps code context in a persona-adaptive UI with architectural layers and language concepts, making agent comprehension inspectable rather than hidden in chat.
items.zhCN: The product wraps code 上下文 in a persona-adaptive UI 具备 architectural layers 和 language concepts，making 智能体 comprehension inspectable 而不是 hidden in chat。

items.source: The repository changes cross-session agent behavior through recall, consolidation, local graph storage, and IDE/MCP integrations.
items.zhCN: The 仓库 changes cross-session 智能体 behavior through recall，consolidation，本地 graph storage，和 IDE/MCP integrations。

items.source: The terminal, repository, file edits, shell commands, and model reasoning become one agentic coding loop.
items.zhCN: The 终端，仓库，文件编辑，shell 命令，和模型推理 become one 智能体编码 loop。

items.source: The user value centers on local, secure, personal agent behavior rather than cloud chat alone.
items.zhCN: The user value centers on 本地，secure，personal 智能体 behavior 而不是 cloud chat alone。

items.source: The workflow is agent-native: coding CLIs navigate career pages, reason over CV/job fit, personalize PDFs, update trackers, deduplicate applications and keep a TUI/dashboard view of the pipeline.
items.zhCN: The 工作流 is 智能体-native：coding CLIs navigate career pages，reason over CV/job fit，personalize PDFs，update trackers，deduplicate applications 和 keep a TUI/仪表盘 view of the pipeline。

items.zhCN: Thin SDK/API 封装面向 Anthropic；useful 基础设施但 not a standalone AI 原生产品工作流。

items.source: tmux-compatible persistent PTY session daemon and CLI substrate for AI coding agents.
items.zhCN: tmux-compatible persistent PTY session daemon 和 CLI substrate 面向 AI coding 智能体。

items.source: Watch closely; first evaluate with demo data and inspect default security posture before connecting real agents.
items.zhCN: 观察 closely；first evaluate 具备 demo data 和检查 default security posture before connecting real 智能体。

items.zhCN: 继续观察 adoption by 智能体 runtimes。

items.zhCN: 继续观察智能体 app templates 和 integration depth。

items.zhCN: 继续观察 collaboration，data connectors，或 deployment improvements。

items.zhCN: 继续观察 concrete notebooks，skill manifests，和智能体-client integration。

items.zhCN: 继续观察 examples，MCP/client integrations，和 repeatable demos before promoting to Top。

items.zhCN: 继续观察 first external adoption 和 package maturity。

items.zhCN: 继续观察 governance-log implementation details。

items.zhCN: 继续观察 guardrail design；do not run 对比 real data before review。

items.zhCN: 继续观察 methodology value；do not 优先 as a product candidate today。

items.zhCN: 继续观察 more examples 和 integrations。

items.zhCN: 继续观察 npm release，then 基准测试对比 one Electron demo app。

items.zhCN: 继续观察 real demos，persistence design，和 failure-handling docs before promoting。

items.zhCN: 继续观察 real examples，docs 和 adoption before promoting。

items.zhCN: 继续观察 real 工作流 demos 和 approval boundaries。

items.zhCN: 继续观察 richer product templates 和 evaluate 面向 future 智能体 UI surfaces。

items.zhCN: 继续观察 runnable demo，connector examples 和 provenance schema maturity。

items.zhCN: 继续观察 runnable examples 和 adoption signals。

items.zhCN: 继续观察 runnable examples 和比较具备 Shep-style orchestration。

items.zhCN: 继续观察 screenshots，Docker/devcontainer 支持，和 complete one-command setup before deep evaluation。

items.zhCN: 继续观察 screenshots，real moderation examples，和安装 docs。

items.zhCN: 继续观察 stable release/demo；revisit when target macOS version is available。

items.zhCN: 观察 how its 工作流运行时 overlaps 具备 Mastra，Activepieces，和 LangGraph-style systems。

items.source: Watch one more cycle; promote only if README shows runnable UI/demo and a clear user workflow.
items.zhCN: 观察 one more cycle；promote only if README 展示 runnable UI/demo 和 a clear 用户工作流。

items.zhCN: 观察 only；revisit if demos 或 cross-平台支持 appears。

items.source: Watch releases rather than include in daily novelty Top list.
items.zhCN: 观察 releases 而不是 include in daily novelty Top 列表。

items.source: Watch the AI teammate + sandbox direction; find the minimal self-host path before deeper evaluation.
items.zhCN: 观察 the AI teammate + 沙箱 direction；find the minimal self-host 路径 before deeper evaluation。

items.source: Watch until CLI or worked example is clearer.
items.zhCN: 观察 until CLI 或 worked example is clearer。

items.source: Watch until demos, CLI, or workflow examples are clearer.
items.zhCN: 观察 until demos，CLI，或工作流 examples are clearer。

items.zhCN: 观察 until examples show a real task loop。

items.zhCN: 观察 until setup 路径和 demo evidence are clearer。

items.source: Watch-to-try; compare with agentmap and CodeGraphContext on one repo.
items.zhCN: 观察-to-try；比较具备 agentmap 和 CodeGraphContext on one repo。

items.source: Watch-to-try; run against one existing long Codex transcript and check if suggested compression keeps factual recall intact.
items.zhCN: 观察-to-try；run 对比 one existing long Codex transcript 和 check if suggested compression keeps factual recall intact。

items.source: Watch, but avoid over-weighting until examples show real product output.
items.zhCN: 观察，但 avoid over-weighting until examples show real product output。

items.source: Watch, but keep out of Top unless agent integration deepens.
items.zhCN: 观察，但 keep out of Top unless 智能体 integration deepens。

items.zhCN: 观察；avoid repeating unless releases show stronger integration depth。

items.zhCN: 观察；比较具备 Agent-Blackbox before trial。

items.zhCN: 观察；比较具备 existing AGENTS.md practices 和 avoid adopting full complexity prematurely。

items.zhCN: 观察；only promote after 安装/security-model 审计。

items.zhCN: 观察；promote only if examples show a real task loop 和 usable 安装路径。

items.zhCN: 观察；promote only if it proves more than a skill/prompt 集合。

items.zhCN: 观察；test only on trusted LAN due remote 终端-control surface。

items.zhCN: Web UI layer 面向 Hermes/智能体工作流，turning backend 智能体 capabilities 组织成一个 user-operable 产品界面/入口。

items.source: Web-based AI agent workspace for user-facing agent operations and interaction management.
items.zhCN: Web-based AI 智能体工作空间面向面向用户的智能体 operations 和 interaction management。

items.source: Windows developers who want multi-agent coding workflows without WSL, plus terminal/browser control in one cockpit.
items.zhCN: Windows 开发者 who want 多智能体 coding 工作流无需 WSL，加上终端/浏览器 control in one cockpit。

items.source: Windows Multi-agent Terminal / MCP Browser Workbench
items.zhCN: Windows Multi-智能体 Terminal / MCP Browser Workbench

items.source: Workflow and context-engineering layer for coding agents.
items.zhCN: Workflow 和上下文-engineering layer 面向 coding 智能体。

items.source: Write into experiment candidates; replicate the approval-gated media workflow design.
items.zhCN: Write into experiment candidates；replicate the approval-gated media 工作流 design。

items.source: Zero is a Slack/web AI teammate that connects to 100+ tools and handles reports, triage, outreach, research, error scanning, release notes, and recurring workflows.
items.zhCN: Zero is a Slack/web AI teammate that connects to 100+ tools 和 handles reports，triage，outreach，研究，error scanning，release notes，和 recurring 工作流。

items.source: Zero is positioned as a trustworthy AI teammate for real work, with an agent runtime and sandbox/workflow orientation.
items.zhCN: Zero is positioned as a trustworthy AI teammate 面向 real work，具备 an 智能体运行时和沙箱/工作流 orientation。

items.source: Zero-trust firewall and protocol bridge for MCP traffic with allowlists, policy interception, audit logs, and human approval.
items.zhCN: 零信任防火墙和协议桥面向 MCP 流量具备允许列表，策略拦截，审计日志，和人工批准。
